caption: A man wearing glasses, black headphones, and a distinctive, tall, silver-grey wig is speaking into a professional microphone in a recording studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt paired with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and a "LEE" branded garment. A red and white logo on the left side of the screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" beneath it, while another similar logo appears on the right with the text "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stationary position, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he continues to speak. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent, focusing on the man from the chest up as he engages with the microphone.
